name: enabled
description: Enable or disable the Calendars plugin display overlay.

name: flagTextColorOverride
description: Override the default text color with a custom color set by textColor property.

name: textColor
description: Custom text color for calendars overlay (used when flagTextColorOverride is true).
example:
// Set text color to gold
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.textColor", core.vec3f(1.0, 0.84, 0.0));

name: flagShowGregorian
description: Show or hide Gregorian calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Gregorian calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowGregorian", true);

name: flagShowJulian
description: Show or hide Julian calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Julian calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowJulian", true);

name: flagShowIslamic
description: Show or hide Islamic (Hijri) calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Islamic calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowIslamic", true);

name: flagShowHebrew
description: Show or hide Hebrew calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Hebrew calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowHebrew", true);

name: flagShowChinese
description: Show or hide Chinese calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Chinese calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowChinese", true);

name: flagShowJapanese
description: Show or hide Japanese calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Japanese calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowJapanese", true);

name: flagShowKorean
description: Show or hide Korean calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Korean calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowKorean", true);

name: flagShowVietnamese
description: Show or hide Vietnamese calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Vietnamese calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowVietnamese", true);

name: flagShowMayaLongCount
description: Show or hide Maya Long Count calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Maya Long Count
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowMayaLongCount", true);

name: flagShowNewHinduSolar
description: Show or hide New Hindu Solar calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show New Hindu Solar calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowNewHinduSolar", true);

name: flagShowNewHinduLunar
description: Show or hide New Hindu Lunar (Panchang) calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show New Hindu Lunar calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowNewHinduLunar", true);

name: flagShowTibetan
description: Show or hide Tibetan (Phuglugs) calendar in the overlay display.
example:
// Show Tibetan calendar
core.setStelProperty("Calendars.flagShowTibetan", true);

name: enable
description: Enable or disable the Calendars plugin display. Equivalent to setting the 'enabled' property.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to enable, false to disable

example:
// Enable calendars overlay
Calendars.enable(true);

name: isEnabled
description: Returns whether the Calendars plugin overlay is enabled.

name: exportCalendars
description: Exports the currently displayed calendar data to an HTML file saved as 'Calendars.html' in Stellarium's user data directory.

name: showGregorian
description: Shows or hides the Gregorian calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Gregorian calendar
Calendars.showGregorian(true);

name: isGregorianDisplayed
description: Returns whether the Gregorian calendar is currently displayed.

name: showJulian
description: Shows or hides the Julian calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Julian calendar
Calendars.showJulian(true);

name: showIslamic
description: Shows or hides the Islamic (Hijri) calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Islamic calendar
Calendars.showIslamic(true);

name: showHebrew
description: Shows or hides the Hebrew calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Hebrew calendar
Calendars.showHebrew(true);

name: showChinese
description: Shows or hides the Chinese calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Chinese calendar with solar terms
Calendars.showChinese(true);

name: showJapanese
description: Shows or hides the Japanese calendar in the overlay (based on Chinese calendar with Tokyo location).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Japanese calendar
Calendars.showJapanese(true);

name: showKorean
description: Shows or hides the Korean calendar in the overlay (based on Chinese calendar with Seoul location).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Korean calendar
Calendars.showKorean(true);

name: showVietnamese
description: Shows or hides the Vietnamese calendar in the overlay (based on Chinese calendar with Saigon location).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Vietnamese calendar
Calendars.showVietnamese(true);

name: showMayaLongCount
description: Shows or hides the Maya Long Count calendar in the overlay (baktun, katun, tun, uinal, kin).

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Maya Long Count
Calendars.showMayaLongCount(true);

name: showMayaHaab
description: Shows or hides the Maya Haab (solar) calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Maya Haab calendar
Calendars.showMayaHaab(true);

name: showMayaTzolkin
description: Shows or hides the Maya Tzolkin (sacred) calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Maya Tzolkin calendar
Calendars.showMayaTzolkin(true);

name: showNewHinduSolar
description: Shows or hides the New Hindu Solar calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show New Hindu Solar calendar
Calendars.showNewHinduSolar(true);

name: showNewHinduLunar
description: Shows or hides the New Hindu Lunar calendar (Panchang) in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show New Hindu Lunar calendar with Panchang
Calendars.showNewHinduLunar(true);

name: showTibetan
description: Shows or hides the Tibetan (Phuglugs) calendar in the overlay.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to show, false to hide

example:
// Show Tibetan calendar
Calendars.showTibetan(true);

name: setTextColor
description: Sets the custom text color for the calendars overlay.

name: getTextColor
description: Returns the current custom text color.
example:
var colorStr = core.getStelProperty("Calendars.textColor");
core.debug("Text color:", colorStr);

name: setFlagTextColorOverride
description: Enables or disables custom text color override.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: true to use custom color, false to use default

example:
// Use custom text color
Calendars.setFlagTextColorOverride(true);

name: getFlagTextColorOverride
description: Returns whether custom text color override is enabled.

name: GregorianCalendar
description: Functions for the Gregorian calendar (proleptic, with year zero).

name: JulianCalendar
description: Functions for the Julian calendar (no year zero).

name: IslamicCalendar
description: Functions for the Islamic (Hijri) calendar.

name: HebrewCalendar
description: Functions for the Hebrew calendar.

name: ChineseCalendar
description: Functions for the Chinese calendar (1645 Qing dynasty version). Returns {cycle, year, month, leap, day}.

name: JapaneseCalendar
description: Functions for the Japanese calendar (based on Chinese calendar with Tokyo location).

name: KoreanCalendar
description: Functions for the Korean calendar (based on Chinese calendar with Seoul location).

name: VietnameseCalendar
description: Functions for the Vietnamese calendar (based on Chinese calendar with Saigon location).

name: MayaLongCountCalendar
description: Functions for the Maya Long Count calendar (baktun, katun, tun, uinal, kin).

name: MayaHaabCalendar
description: Functions for the Maya Haab (solar) calendar.

name: MayaTzolkinCalendar
description: Functions for the Maya Tzolkin (sacred) calendar.

name: NewHinduSolarCalendar
description: Functions for the New Hindu Solar calendar.

name: NewHinduLunarCalendar
description: Functions for the New Hindu Lunar calendar (Panchang - tithi, nakshatra, yoga, karana).

name: TibetanCalendar
description: Functions for the Tibetan (Phuglugs) calendar.

name: OldHinduSolarCalendar
description: Functions for the Old Hindu Solar calendar (Arya Siddhanta).

name: Calendar
description: Base class for all calendars providing astronomical calculation functions. All calendars inherit these static methods.

name: ISOCalendar
description: Functions for the ISO week calendar (year, week number, day of week).

name: RevisedJulianCalendar
description: Functions for the Revised Julian calendar (used by some Orthodox churches).

name: EgyptianCalendar
description: Functions for the ancient Egyptian calendar (365 days, 3 seasons of 4 months of 30 days + 5 epagomenal days).

name: RomanCalendar
description: Functions for the Roman calendar (pre-Julian, with Kalends, Nones, Ides).

name: AztecXihuitlCalendar
description: Functions for the Aztec Xihuitl (solar) calendar.

name: AztecTonalpohualliCalendar
description: Functions for the Aztec Tonalpohualli (260-day sacred) calendar.

name: BalinesePawukonCalendar
description: Functions for the Balinese Pawukon (210-day) calendar.

name: FrenchArithmeticCalendar
description: Functions for the French Revolutionary calendar (arithmetic version).

name: PersianArithmeticCalendar
description: Functions for the Persian (Jalali) calendar (arithmetic version).

name: BahaiArithmeticCalendar
description: Functions for the Baháʼí calendar (arithmetic version).
